mentions.note: Up straight line; Cramer and Jeff Mars did hard pass; too dangerous, too expensive; would be seller not buyer on further strength.
Fiber optic for data center AI infrastructure; Nvidia invested $2B. Up 1,300% from April 2025 lows, higher risk/reward than Coherent. Added to S&P 500.
Fiber optics play +90.7% Q1, just added to S&P; Nvidia invested $2B; wins as AI data center buildout continues unabated; though unlikely to replicate 15-month gains.
Optical and photonic component supplier rallying as hardware dominates; benefits from data center and networking buildout.
Optical transceiver/laser supplier with revenue and margins; Nvidia $2B investment validates; cheaper than speculative Lightwave Logic.
Caller Marty cites $12.4B 2025 revenue, partnerships with Microsoft/Google/Palantir/Crowd/AWS; transformation from legacy telecom to AI; decent spec with upside.
Fiber optics networking rival to Coherent; up 36.5% since bottom (15th best performer). Transition from copper to fiber for lower heat, higher speed drives demand.
Proven optical player with NVIDIA endorsement; benefiting from AI data-center buildout; preferred over speculative POET; solid fundamentals.
Photonics/optical networking supplier; on show but Cramer regrets missing despite understanding value.
Helps machines in data center communicate; bullish on data-center connectivity plays.
